title: oreogrammitis monticola
intro: Oreogrammitis monticola, also known as the mountain fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis monticola include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
